intent: Stress categorization and trend summaries with dense, low-value card activity.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should identify high transaction frequency even when per-transaction amounts are small.
customerProfileSummary: Card-centric daily-spend profile with high transaction count and low average ticket size.
whatToLookFor: High small-card transaction count and subtle pressure from cumulative micro-spend.
sanitizedNotice: Transactions are fabricated and do not map to real consumers or cards.
